profile.innate_zh: 警觉性高、执行力强、责任心重
profile.learned_zh: 退伍军人背景带来的纪律性和危机处理能力
profile.learned_en: Military background · discipline and crisis handling
profile.belief_zh: 安全是一切活动的前提
profile.contradiction_zh: 想保护学生 vs 学生觉得管太多
profile.contradiction_en: Wants to protect students vs. students find him too restrictive
profile.deep_zh: 其实看到学生平安就很满足
profile.rhythm_zh: 早起巡逻，白天处理事务，晚上再巡一遍
profile.rhythm_en: Morning patrol, admin day, night patrol
profile.spaces_zh: 保卫处、校门口、校园各处巡逻
profile.short_goal_zh: 检查下周大型活动的安保方案
profile.short_goal_en: Review security plan for next week's event
profile.constraint_zh: 安保经费不足；外来人员管理难度大
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把学生的自由活动看成安全隐患
profile.bias_en: Treats student free movement as a risk
profile.narrative_zh: 没出事的时候没人觉得我们重要
profile.narrative_en: No one cares about us until something goes wrong
